measured.note: slower than claimed (rtx 349 vs 204 ms at 4 envs); per-env RTX loses even harder on this host
DOES NOT REPRODUCE claimed 221 img/s; ~1.45x slower, repeatable, splats-only also slower (189-211 vs 128.7 claimed)

claimed.note: PR #54 context: raster 132.5 ms vs tracer 13.6 ms — NOT ray-matched (tracer used its own identity-orientation cameras, hit_frac 0.085)

after_optimization.note: identical parity PSNR to the pre-optimization baseline; sweep in runs.optimization_sweep

measured.note: ray-matched (identical cameras via gs_tracer --cams), 3 repeats, env-0 PSNR 35.8/40.1 dB; raster pays full output contract, tracer RGBA-only
1.8x faster than claimed; main's gaussian kernel improved since the stack branched
~5.4x faster than claimed; same 6130 hit px/env workload; warp 1.15.0

environment.libnvoptix: shipped with driver in nvcr.io/nvidia/isaac-sim:6.0.1 image

purpose: Same-hardware validation of the claims in PRs #51/#53/#54 for the RTX Gaussian compositing PR

g1_import_report.scope: Validates robot collision/articulation authoring only. A Gaussian scene requires a separate PhysX collision proxy.
